mapping.a_element: Whitham modulation approach for dispersive shock waves
mapping.b_element: nonlinear hydrodynamics equations (KdV/mKdV type) for soliton excitations

mapping.a_element: sharp step-like initial discontinuity in light beam intensity
mapping.b_element: decay of the density step in ultracold bosonic atoms

mapping.a_element: dispersive shock wave formation in photorefractive media
mapping.b_element: soliton formation and dynamics in optical lattices
stability analysis of solutions to transverse fluctuations

brief_justification: Both papers study the evolution of step-like initial discontinuities in nonlinear media, leading to dispersive shock waves or solitons. Paper A uses the Whitham modulation approach, while Paper B derives Korteweg-de Vries (KdV) type equations, both of which are frameworks for describing nonlinear wave propagation and shock formation in dispersive systems.
